CREATE TABLE test_dynamic(d Dynamic) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE TABLE test_nested(d Dynamic) ENGINE = Memory;
WITH (SELECT DISTINCT d FROM test_dynamic) AS distinct_types SELECT distinctDynamicTypes(d) FROM (SELECT d FROM test_dynamic WHERE d IS NOT NULL) AS filtered;
CREATE TABLE test_joins (id UInt32, d Dynamic) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_joins VALUES (1, 42), (2, NULL), (3, 'foo'), (4, ([1, 2, 3])), (5, map(1, 'bar'));
SELECT distinctDynamicTypes(t1.d) FROM test_dynamic AS t1 JOIN test_joins AS t2 ON t1.d = t2.d WHERE t1.d IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_union (id UInt32, d Dynamic) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_union VALUES (1, (1)), (2, (2)), (3, ('Hello')), (4, NULL), (5, map(3, 4));
SELECT distinctDynamicTypes(d) FROM (SELECT d FROM test_dynamic UNION ALL SELECT d FROM test_union);
CREATE TABLE test_combined (x Int32, d Dynamic) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT x, distinctDynamicTypes(d) FROM test_combined GROUP BY x, d;
